title: Fail interview cutscene: walk to bench, lie down, game over
description: When the player fails the interview, play a cutscene where the character walks back to the bench, lies down, and then trigger game over.

title: Lock store door between ReturnDepot and Payday scenes
description: The player can open the store door before the Payday scene starts, which teleports them from inside the store to outside. Lock the door so it cannot be opened during the ReturnDepot scene and keep it locked until the Payday scene ends.

title: Remove one non-police car from the game
Add NPCs that walk around the map
Bug: hotel check-in triggers without pressing E
description: Fix a bug where the player automatically checks into the hotel without needing to press the E key interaction prompt. The check-in should only occur when the player explicitly presses E while near the hotel entrance.

title: Fix truck clipping through buildings and walls
description: The delivery truck can clip through building meshes and the boundary stone walls. Add proper collision detection so the truck is blocked by buildings and walls the same way the player is.

title: Add police car and jail mechanic
description: Add a police car NPC that patrols the world. If the player hits a pedestrian, the police respond and the player gets sent to a jail cell. The game ends (game over screen) once the player is jailed.

title: Place a box in front of house after delivery
description: After the player completes a delivery to a house, spawn/display a box prop in front of that house to indicate the delivery was made.

title: Add 4 NPC cars that drive on roads and avoid NPCs
description: Spawn 4 NPC-driven cars that patrol/drive along the road network. Cars must: stay on roads, not collide with pedestrian NPCs, and have basic avoidance so they don't pile up.

title: Slow down truck speed slightly
description: Reduce the truck's top speed by a small amount - not too much, just a subtle reduction to make it feel a bit more controlled.

title: Player knocked away when hit by car
description: When an NPC car collides with the player, apply a knockback force to push the player out of the way in the direction of impact.

title: Fix roads clipping into boundary walls
description: The road segments near the map perimeter are visually intersecting the stone boundary walls. Adjust road end-points or wall placement so roads terminate cleanly before the walls.

title: Show money HUD in top-right corner
description: Display the player's current money balance in the top-right corner of the screen as a HUD element. Should update in real-time as money changes (e.g. after receiving paycheck or spending money).

title: Interview questions can only be selected on minimap, not main screen
Truck is spawned inside a building and is unusable
Add fast food restaurant with post-paycheck spending loop
description: Add a fast food restaurant building to the world. After the player receives their paycheck, they must visit the fast food restaurant and spend \ to buy food, then go to the hotel. This creates a spending loop: work -> paycheck -> fast food (\) -> hotel.

title: Add hunger bar that depletes per mission, refills at Burger Barn
Fix camera occlusion by buildings
description: The camera gets covered by some buildings making it impossible to see the player in certain areas. Implement camera occlusion handling so the player is always visible (e.g. fade/hide obstructing buildings, raise camera, or use a transparency pass).

title: Improve player look
Add sidewalks
Lower NPC count to 8
Burger Barn buy prompt stays on screen after visiting
Remove fog/atmosphere effect from minimap
Move Depot building next to the Store
description: Reposition the Depot building in world.js so it is placed directly adjacent to the Store building.

title: Add building labels: Store and Hotel text on buildings
description: Render visible text labels on the Store building saying 'STORE' and on the Hotel building saying 'HOTEL' so players can identify them at a glance.

title: Add hat store with wearable hats
description: Create a hat store location in the world where the player can spend in-game money to purchase hats. Purchased hats should be visually worn on the player character's sprite/model and persist during gameplay.

title: Add walking animation to player character
description: Implement a walking animation for the player character when they are moving on foot. The animation should play when walking and stop when idle.

title: Add stone wall boundary to prevent leaving map
description: Players can currently walk outside the map into the void. Add a stone wall around the map perimeter to block movement out of bounds and prevent players from seeing into the void.

title: Camera clips outside map near walls
description: When the player walks close to a boundary wall, the camera can see outside the map. The far clipping plane or camera distance needs to be adjusted, or fog/culling should hide the exterior.

title: Display current mission name in top-left corner of screen
Cutscene system with 6 trigger points
description: Add a cutscene/narrative system to the game. Cutscenes should trigger at the following moments: 1) Game start/intro, 2) Before the job interview, 3) When you receive your paycheck, 4) When you buy dinner, 5) When you check into the hotel, 6) When you lose the game (game over).

title: Auto-park car at depot after deliveries
description: When the player finishes delivering all packages and returns to the depot, automatically park the car back in its starting position/spot.

title: NPCs walking into player truck triggers police
Add park features: slides, swings, sandbox
description: The park is currently just an empty area of green land. Add park objects and decorations such as slides, swings, and a sandbox to make it feel like an actual park.

title: Store door should not open before interview starts
Add doors to houses and place packages at door
description: Houses should have a visible door. When delivering a package, the drop-off marker and placed package should appear in front of the door rather than at a generic house position.

title: Disable collision between truck and NPC cars
description: When the player is driving in the truck, collisions with other NPC cars should be ignored so the truck passes through them without stopping or causing damage.

title: Debug feature: skip to any game phase
description: Add a debug/cheat feature that allows the player to automatically skip to any phase of the game (e.g. via a keyboard shortcut or debug menu). Useful for testing.

title: Remove blue circle under player
Roads overlap houses, should run between them
description: Roads currently go through/overlap houses. They should be placed between houses so roads act as proper streets separating buildings.
